preamble: A diphthong shift where the rising diphthong ie lowers and shifts to the falling diphthong ai.

examples.note: Shift from front high-mid diphthong to low central-front diphthong.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
